name: China import and cross-border retail seed pack
change_note: Initial China import seed pack with routing requirements only; official China sources must be checked per case.

regulator_map.notes: Verify import registration, customs route, bonded/direct mail model, and product admissibility.
Verify cosmetics/medical classification, registration/notification, labeling, and responsible entity route.
Verify market supervision, labeling, standards, claims, and product quality obligations.
Verify trademark status, owner, class, and territory when brand rights affect the decision.

checklist_hints: Separate cross-border retail bonded/direct-mail route from general trade import; required materials can differ.
Verify overseas entity, brand authorization chain, Chinese label, customs/import model, platform category requirements, and regulator classification.
For food, cosmetics, supplements, infant/child products, medical, wireless, and special-use claims, require current official source verification.

requirements.requirement: Identify whether the application uses cross-border retail, bonded warehouse, direct mail, or general trade import, then verify the matching China customs and platform route.
requirements.decision_effect: Cannot approve China import/cross-border cases until the route and applicable official obligations are verified.
requirements.notes: Seed routing requirement; do not mix cross-border retail and general trade assumptions.

requirements.requirement: Verify Chinese label, product name, ingredients/materials, warnings, claims, and category-specific registration or notification route.
requirements.decision_effect: Unsupported claims, missing label obligations, or unclear category classification requires more information or human escalation.
requirements.notes: High-risk areas include food, supplements, cosmetics, infant/child products, medical, pesticides, and wireless/electronics.

gaps: Add current official GACC/NMPA/SAMR/CNIPA source IDs.
Add platform-specific Tmall Global and JD Worldwide source IDs before marking validated.
Add golden cases for food, cosmetics, and route mismatch scenarios.
